ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used by the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used by the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model was uploaded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path where the model is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "business_unit" TEXT /* Business unit of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the algorithm was last updated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Default parameters of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model being evaluated */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve (AUC) */,
  "logloss" REAL /* Log loss */,
  "mean_per_class_error" REAL /* Mean per-class error */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error (RMSE) */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error (MSE) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who evaluated the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the performance entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the performance entry was last updated */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics that are not predefined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
